horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: The first week of April will start with Venus entering Taurus, which rules your second house it is showing financial activities, budgeting, and spending too. This is a 50-50 situation for Aries natives as there will be gains, but expenses also will be the part of this transit. There will be multiple purchases than usual like clothes, food or cosmetics, where it can happen online or offline. There will be family related expenses, some people will get freelancing or full time job opportunities, or they will update their skills. You will also think about starting new investment plans, organising receipts, and you will also have some beauty treatments too.

The full moon will rise in the seventh house on the first of April which will bring completions in the personal and business relationships. The full moon doesn’t always show bad endings, it also shows you getting something which you always wanted. This week can bring one to one meeting, to have a clear understanding about the deal. Pending conversations will happen, and you will take final decision about a deal or a relationship. The full moon will increase your visibility and you will attend social gatherings, parties, or business meets too.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury in your twelfth house will bring some private conversations about your long term plans. You will have secret tasks, or complete pending responsibilities without third party involvement. There will be late night phone calls, reading private messages, or meeting with your ex. The twelfth house indicates healing, so you will visit hospitals for yourself, for others, or you will go for some therapy for self-healing. This is a complex phase for those who were waiting to get some updates about their long trips or foreign collaborations. Please control your expenses for others, rather you focus on wealth building.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: For Taurus natives, your ruler Venus will enter your first house, and that will bring visible changes in your daily life and appearance. You will be focused on updating your style, so you will buy clothes, grooming products, or personal accessories. This is a time where your presence will be appreciated, so you will attend meetings, social gatherings, or personal errands. You will do all that, so that people can notice you, but being a Taurus native, you are a bit reserved, but this nature will dissolve this week, as Venus will make you a bit relaxed. This is also a time for new initiatives, new relationships, completing documents, and starting a new routine too.

The full moon will rise in the air sign of Libra on the first will bring more activity at work, and your daily routine The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete a project at work, or job seekers may get a new opportunity which you were searching for. You will submit reports, have important conversations with your colleagues, but there are chances for arguments with them. The Moon in the sixth house can bring emotional and health related concerns, and it will be primarily emotional, so you need to correct your mento-emotional energy, as it is a kind of battery which affects your daily life. Some of you will spend more time with your pets too.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, which is not a green flag for your team settings, as both planets are not friendly to each other. However, you will have team meetings, but arguments also will be the part of this week. There will be frequent messages, calls, group chats, or social media activities. You will meet friends, team mates, and also your elder siblings, during this week, or travel to meet fiends. This transit also will bring opportunities to join new organisations.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: For Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs will have good sleep and dreams as Venus will enter your twelfth house of sleep, isolation and detachment. The Sun is also there, but Venus holds the lesser degree, so you will have enough time for rest and restoration. You will also make online purchases, pay subscriptions, or spend on personal items, as Venus in the twelfth house will increase the expenses. The mental and physical health also will be important, so you will go for healing therapies, handle some private tasks. The Sun doesn’t like to be here, so you will choose to stay silent , managing your work through personal devices.

On the first itself, the full moon will rise in your fifth house, which will bring completions, and it doesn’t have to be always negative. There will be many activities like outings, meetings with someone you like, or single Gemini Sun, Moon and rising will go for dates. There will a lot of activities with children like parents visiting their school or children starting some courses. The Moon in the fifth house will bring social gatherings for entertainment events. You will be noticed for your creative skills, but please don’t invest huge money in creative projects like business, as there are chances for some losses.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, which rules your tenth house, so that will keep you busy at work. There will be multiple meetings, communications with managers, and there will be multitasking too. Those who work in admin, armed forces, police department, writing, and communication will have a lot of work. Both the planets are not friendly with each other, so there are chances for arguments with your managers, still job seekers will have the closest opportunities to have a new job.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: The water animals of the zodiac will have fresh start as Venus, the planet for beauty and diplomacy will enter Taurus, which rules eleventh house of team settings and long term projects, and the Sun is also there. There will planning for long term projects, team discussions and some special events in the life of your siblings. There will be frequent communications through calls, messages, and you will be active in social media groups as well. You will be able to join new organisations, some of you will get new friends, or your team mates will introduce you to new contacts. Those who work in space, technology, charity and finance related domain will have new projects.

On the first the full moon will impact the fourth house, so the family and home related matters will be active for the next six months. There will be clutter clearing, renovation, relocation, or some home improvement projects in the next six months. You will complete some pending tasks, home related purchases or hold some family gatherings too. The Moon in Libra will also bring problem solving sessions at home, but it makes take some time as the impact can last for the next six months.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury are moving through Pisces, but they both will leave this sign by April second week, until then the doors for long trips will be open, but with some blocks. You will book the ticket, visit embassy or travel agent offices, or handle some paperwork, which can be legal. There will be a lot of calls, emails, projects from writing, publishing, and follow up with foreign colleges, or travel advisors. You will have a spiritual inclination, so you will be interested in prayer, meditation and pilgrimages. Since both the planets are hostile to each other, so there will be some arguments with your fatherly figures.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: For the lions of the zodiac, this week will bring some pleasant moves about your career, as Venus, the planet for diplomacy, will move into Taurus, and Sun is also there. You will be visible in the public domain with a better image, at the same time, you may also feel a bit narcissistic. You will attend meetings, interact with managers, and participate in workplace discussions. The Sun and Venus will improve your aura, and people will be accepting your ideas. New job opportunities, promotions, appraisals also can come up, so professionals should focus on their work. You will also spend on work related needs such as clothing, travel or work devices.

The full moon will rise in the third house on the first, so there will be completion of communication paper work, and short traves and some complex tasks. There will be a lot of communications, and projects from such domain. The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete some projects from domains connected to teaching, preaching and counselling. There will be activities like publishing your work, finalising documentation, or completing pending applications. The third house indicates communications, so you will communicate with your siblings, friends, and there will be short trips too.

Mars and Mercury will be impacting your eighth house, so, there will be a lot of communication about financial matters. Both the planets are hostile with each other, so the financial matters are not in a safe mode. You will visit banks, communicate about tax, insurance and PF, and they need restructuring. There will be meetings with financial consultant and business partners too. Mars itself is the planet for financial liabilities, so you will surely have some financial concerns, so make sure you control your expenses. Please avoid rash driving, and avoid all risky physical sports too.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: The first week of April witness the Venus in Taurus, and there will be a fresh energy through learning and spirituality. The ninth house already have the Sun, and Venus’s entry will bring long trips, foreign collaborations and programs like cultural exchange. You will book tickets, or spend money for visa processing too, but make sure the country which you want to travel have peace and there are no global threats. Some of you will attend workshops, training programs, or online courses too, and there will be a lot of online and offline communications. This transit also will bring opportunities for writing, publishing and discussion with gurus or mentors.

The full moon will rise in your second house on the first, which will bring completion in the financial matters. The full moon indicates perfections, and completions, so you will complete some payments, or you will get pending payments. You will directly handle cash transactions, or make some online purchases on that product which you always wanted to purchase. This is a very complex opportunity for job seekers, as there will be need of upskilling for the jobs which you wanted to apply. Please try to have careful food intake, otherwise there will be digestive issues.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, and that will bring more visibility in the public. Both the planets are moving through the seventh house, so there will be multiple meetings with clients, business partners, or there will be plenty or arguments as well so you need to be careful. The couples have to be extra care, as both Mars and Mercury will increase the dominating nature between both. There will be many opportunities for public appearances through social gatherings, networking, parties or business meets. The specialty of this week, will be a kind of instability, but it will not be damaging.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: Librans will be highly focussed on financial matters as your ruler Venus will be entering the eighth house of finances. The eighth house also indicates resurrection, so, for the next twenty eight days, you will have some solutions for various problems in life. You will visit banks, handle insurance, or spend time in finance related matters. This is also a week to meet people who go through emotional or physical issues, and your presence will make them cheerful and happy. Since the Sun is also there, so you also feel the need of some emotional support too. Some sudden expenses can also come up during this time, and it can also be medical too.

The full moon will impact your first house, and that will increase the visibility , so get ready to go for public gatherings. The full moon indicates endings or perfections, so you will be completing some formalities in a deal. There will be meetings, social gatherings, or interact with more people. You will have concerns regarding your appearance, so you will go for such treatments which you always wanted to do. The Moon indicates emotions, so you will be a bit emotional about your personal life, as there will be some endings.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury are moving through the sixth house, so your daily life will be fast, as both are fast and furious planets. You will have multiple tasks at work, so there will be projects, meetings and you will have to meet deadlines also. Since both are aggressive planets, you will have arguments with your colleagues, but you should avoid that as well. Some work can be repetitive, which can impact your physical health as well. So, there are chances for you to visit doctors, complete medical tests, or start a new health care plan.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: The good phase regarding relationship will starting from this week onwards as Venus will move into Taurus, so the relationship sector is highly active. For the past one week, the Sun was in here, so you had to take some risks in the relationship, but after the entry of Venus issues will start diminishing. If you were going through a relationship issues, you will get the cues to solve them. Single Scorpio, Sun, Moon and rising natives will get many opportunities to find a new relationship. Social gatherings, scheduled meetings, and collaborations also networking will be coming up, so get ready for such changes.

The full moon will rise in the twelfth house, so that will bring closure to some issues which you were going through. You will complete some tasks, that were pending, or finish some private tasks. The twelfth house indicates isolation and detachment, so you will try to spend some alone time every day reviewing the daily activities. There will be hidden expenses like subscriptions, medical bills or online services. You will also get some updates from the foreign lands about long trips or foreign settlements too. There will be complex dreams, and sleep issues, but those dreams will give you some signals about the future.

Meanwhile Mars and Mercury are impacting your creative sector, so you will spend more time in setting up a business through your passion projects. However, it is not advisable to spend a lot of money in these, as there are challenges, so don’t invest in huge risky ventures. Dating couples will have some arguments, and this is not the time to start a new relationship. You can also expect creative tasks such as content creation, design or performance related work, and people will surely notice you. This is the time to spend more time with children or youngsters.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: Your work related sector will be very active as already the Sun is moving through Taurus, and Venus will also enter here, and it will be a protection to your work. You will handle multiple tasks, meetings and you will have to organise your schedule so that you can be efficient. You may spend a lot on food, for workplace devices, or health related items. Kindly avoid junk and sweet dishes, as the cravings will be high, and you will have health issues due to that. Please avoid unwanted talks with your colleagues, otherwise there will be arguments, which can impact your negatively.

The full moon will rise in your eleventh house and it will bring some closures in the long term projects. Not only closures, but you will be clear about your social circle and group connections, so, you will realise who is your supporter and who opposes you. You will attend social gatherings, meet friends, or participate in team discussions, and you will finalise some plans. This full moon will bring offer letter for a post which you always waiting for after multiple rounds of interviews. There will be new opportunities coming up for those who work in finance and tech sector.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the fourth house, so there will be some activity at home, like arranging the furniture or clutter clearing. You will clean, rearrange the house, handle repairs, as there are chances for plumbing and electrical related work. Family discussions will be there, but there are chances to end them in chaos. Please stay away from family politics, otherwise you will worsen the situation. You will also have real estate deals like selling and buying a land, or discussion with a real estate agent. Both Mars and Mercury are hostile to each other, so you have to take care of your elderly people’s health as well.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: Venus, the planet for love and diplomacy will enter Taurus, which rules your fifth house, and that is surely going to be a pleasant event for you. Even though the Sun is here, after Venus’s entry, you will feel more outgoing, and you will spend more time for romance, leisure, and personal enjoyment. There will be social gatherings, dinners, or entertainment activities, like movies, games, or hobbies. This is a bright opportunity for single Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising signs to find someone special. Parents will attend school events, or activities related to children, so they have to be alert towards the needs of children.

The full moon will rise in the tenth house, so you will be more visible at work, so make sure your visibility is for the right reasons. You will attend meetings, you will also have some presentations, or complete some pending tasks. You will have direct interactions with your managers, or senior staff, and they will explain your responsibilities. They will also review your work, so make sure you perform the best, so that the reviews can be in your Favor. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to get a new project also, and there are chances for feed backs as well.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, so you will have a lot of communication and short travels. You will make multiple calls, and you will also attend local meetings, which can be online or offline. The third house indicates communications, so there will be a lot of emails, messages, or phone calls coming up. You will also get opportunities to write and publish your articles, enrol in a course, or visit your siblings. This is a complex full moon, so you will have minor health issues, which will vanish after the full moon eve gets over.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: For Aquarius, Sun, Moon and rising signs, Venus will enter the fourth house, and that will bring a lot of activity at home. This is the time to clean and beautify the house, so you will buy some objects to improve the aesthetics of the house. You will also purchase kitchen items, or daily use essentials to improve the lifestyle. There will be some family functions, or you will visit family members, and spend time in discussing practical matters. The Sun is also there, so there will be arguments with them, still, you will be able to solve them amicably.

The full moon will rise in the ninth house, so there will be some decision making regarding higher education and foreign collaborations. You will go to a long distance travel which you always wanted to go or you will finalise such decision. There will be events like booking the tickets, completing the visa process, or understanding some legal issues as well. Higher education is also possible, so some people will attend workshop or start to attend universities, or you will have final round discussion for such matters. Writing, teaching and publishing also can be possible, and you will go for media related activities.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the second house and this transit is not a green flag, you will have financial issues, so go for careful spending. You will handle payments, check balances or go for a discussion with a consultant. There will be discussions with the family about budgeting and you will ask everyone to spend carefully. Please double check the transactions, as there are chances for errors too. The second house indicates speech, so you will have arguments with everyone around you, if you don’t control your speech. You will have to control your diet as well, otherwise there will be food allergies.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting March 29
content: For Pisces Sun, Moon and rising natives will have a busy week, as Venus will be entering the third house during this week. You will have a lot of communication, short trips, and a lot of movement in your daily life. You will have frequent conversations online and offline, and there will be local appointment too. You will travel short distances with your friends or solo, or your siblings or friends will visit with you. This is a very important time for writers, students, and teachers, as they will have such projects very often. Due to this multitasking, there are chances for arguments too.

The full moon in the eighth house which is a complex event, so you will have to be very careful with the finances. You will handle bank work, you will get alerts from the banks about your pending loans, or there will be loan related work as well. Some of the payments will get processed, and you will get some money or there will be sudden expenses. This Moon also will bring some emotional concerns, and some of you will go through some therapies. Please avoid any kind of risky sports like rash driving and swimming too.

Meanwhile, your personal life is a bit volatile, as Mars and Mercury are moving through your sign, so you will get involved in multiple tasks. You will be more visible in the public place, as both the planets are fast and furious. The body heat also will be a bit high, so there are chances for you waking up with mid headache, but it will vanish after Mercury moves out from your sign, but it will take some more days. It is natural to have some irritation when Mercury is moving through your sign, especially through the first house.
